title: Enchanted Golden Carrot
description:
Enchanted Golden Carrot is a datapack that adds a craftable carrot imbued with extra power.
Eating it grants Speed, Strength, Jump Boost, and Night Vision for a limited duration.
body: # Enchanted Golden Carrot Enchanted Golden Carrot is a datapack that adds a craftable carrot imbued with extra power. Eating it grants Speed, Strength, Jump Boost, and Night Vision for a limited duration. [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W) ![Enchanted Golden Carrot Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9gSWu3WM/images/c87095ba8e1f79aa77b4674c948d02ab3d0a0c55.gif) ![Enchanted Golden Carrot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59f5e19e4f19a6e3121e4cfbd62b4811c5b484cb.png) ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ## Bug Reports and Feature Requests If you found bugs or need support, contact us by joining [our discord server](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W).
